## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? One paragraph with rationale. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link: Fixes #123 or Relates to #456 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Chore / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Updated docs if CLI, schemas, or workflows changed
- [ ] Added a [changeset](https://github.com/changesets/changesets) if this affects published packages (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Significant changes include verdict rationale in the PR description (outer loop dogfooding)

## Answerability note

<!-- For non-trivial changes: why is this safe to merge? What did you verify? -->
